name: @bsb/demo-todo-app
description: BSB Demo Todo Application - Comprehensive example showcasing BSB best practices

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npm run copy-static
scripts.copy-static: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='src/plugins/service-demo-todo/static'; const dest='lib/plugins/service-demo-todo/static'; fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive: true}); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(file => fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src, file), path.join(dest, file)));"

author: BSB Team
